a.xlink:title: Create central frame for visual widgets.
Adds a card to the given zone.
Update the currently selected card in the deck and UI.
Updates the card info dock and printing selector.
Decrements a card from the given zone.
Opens an EDHRec tab for the given card.
Handle card clicks in the database visual display.
Handle card clicks in the mainboard visual deck.
Shows the printing selector dock and updates it with the current card.
Updates just the card info dock.
Change the deck view selection to a specific card.
Convenience helper to get the card's display name.
